PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?winner ?winnerLabel ?eventLabel ?eventDate ?birthDate WHERE {
  ?event rdfs:label ?eventLabel ; wdt:P31 wd:Q58004 ; wdt:P577 ?eventDate ; wdt:P1545 ?winner .
  ?winner wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
  FILTER(LANG(?eventLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?eventLabel) , "us open" , "i"))
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?eventLabel) , "men's singles" , "i"))
  FILTER(xsd:date(?eventDate) >= "2014-01-01" ^^ xsd:date)
  FILTER(xsd:date(?eventDate) <= "2023-12-31" ^^ xsd:date)
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" .
  }
}
ORDER BY ASC(?birthDate)", "kg": "wikidata", "selections": "Using entities:
- Festung (wd:Q58004)

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?winner ?winnerLabel ?eventLabel ?eventDate ?birthDate WHERE {
  ?event rdfs:label ?eventLabel ; wdt:P31 wd:Q58004 ; wdt:P577 ?eventDate ; wdt:P1545 ?winner .
  ?winner wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
  FILTER(LANG(?eventLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?eventLabel) , "us open" , "i"))
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?eventLabel) , "men's singles" , "i"))
  FILTER(xsd:date(?eventDate) >= "2014-01-01" ^^ xsd:date)
  FILTER(xsd:date(?eventDate) <= "2023-12-31" ^^ xsd:date)
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" .
  }
}
ORDER BY ASC(?birthDate)
```

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?winner ?winnerLabel ?eventLabel ?eventDate ?birthDate WHERE {
  ?event rdfs:label ?eventLabel ; wdt:P31 wd:Q58004 ; wdt:P577 ?eventDate ; wdt:P1545 ?winner .
  ?winner wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
  FILTER(LANG(?eventLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?eventLabel) , "us open" , "i"))
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?eventLabel) , "men's singles" , "i"))
  FILTER(xsd:date(?eventDate) >= "2014-01-01" ^^ xsd:date)
  FILTER(xsd:date(?eventDate) <= "2023-12-31" ^^ xsd:date)
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" .
  }
}
ORDER BY ASC(?birthDate)
```
